decisions.briefing: Market data was unavailable today, making it difficult to read near-term direction. Cash sits at $477.14 — just below the $500 threshold required to open new positions, so no buys are triggered. Existing positions remain intact; the top screener candidates (OUST, MTN, FLEX) stay on watchlist for next session when cash may exceed the threshold or a position closes.

market_education.summary_en: Market data was unavailable for today's session, with both the S&P 500 and NASDAQ reporting no movement. Without reliable price action or volume context, directional conviction is low. In such conditions, disciplined portfolio management means holding current positions and waiting for clearer signals before deploying capital.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日市場數據未能取得，標普500指數與納斯達克指數均無明顯波動記錄。在缺乏可靠價格走勢與成交量資訊的情況下，市場方向難以判斷。面對此類情形，嚴謹的投資組合管理原則是維持現有持倉，靜待更明確的市場信號後再考慮部署資金。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Cash drag refers to the performance cost of holding uninvested cash in a portfolio. While cash provides safety and flexibility, it earns little return and can cause the portfolio to underperform if markets rise. Today's portfolio sits at $477 cash — close to but just under the $500 deployment threshold, illustrating the fine line between prudent reserves and idle capital.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「現金拖累」（Cash Drag）是指投資組合中持有未投資現金所帶來的績效損耗。現金雖然提供安全性與靈活性，但回報率極低，一旦市場上漲便可能導致組合表現落後。今日投資組合持有477美元現金，略低於500美元的部署門檻，正好說明審慎備用金與閒置資本之間那條微妙的界線。
